title: Creating GAMS model documentations with goxygen
text: Goxygen provides tools extract model documentation GAMS code, including comments, code, even GAMS equations, latter converted latex code. allows GAMS code explanatory text side side gms files, makes easier keep comments date code. goxygen output returned HTML, Markdown, PDF format. order use package need install pandoc pandoc-citeproc first (https://pandoc.org/), already available system. Goxygen can extract documentation plain GAMS code (see plain example) GAMS models modularized structure described Dietrich et al. (2019) (see modular example). testing please switch folder test models can copied documentation can extracted (e.g. temporary directory).

what: Running goxygen on plain GAMS code
title: Creating GAMS model documentations with goxygen
text: take GAMS code example package save dummymodel-plain: execute goxygen GAMS file produce documentation HTML well PDF format. goxygen now searches code lines starting goxygen tag *', interpretes goxygen identifiers, compiles documentation format specified (html, tex, pdf). Please find goxygen output folder dummymodel-plain/doc.
code: # copy the folder containing a simple dummy model with goxygen comments file.copy(from = system.file("dummymodel-plain", package = "goxygen"), to = ".", recursive = TRUE) goxygen::goxygen(path = "dummymodel-plain/", cff = "HOWTOCITE.cff")

title: Creating GAMS model documentations with goxygen
text: short example GAMS file contains identifiers available goxygen. resulting document starts table contents. @title Adds heading title documentation. first line used. @description Contains text describing model. Start new paragraph adding blank line starts *'. @authors List authors model . @limitations Explain limitation model. @code following lines model code displayed documentation output code blocks. Lines starting *' displayed regular text. @equations starts equation section goxygen converts GAMS equations LaTeX code displayed nicely output. @stop Everything following ignored next identifier mentioned . case following code included documentation output: @code tag resumes documentation.
code: *' Even goxygen comments are ignored. display v01_intern.l;

title: Creating GAMS model documentations with goxygen
text: identifiers can combined additional attributes, passed comma separated list key/values within curly braces right identifier: @identifier{attribute: value}. now, supported attribute extrapage.

title: Creating GAMS model documentations with goxygen
text: extrapage attribute indicates documentation moved new page specified.
code: *' @description{extrapage: "settings"} The macro-economic core of REMIND is a Ramsey-type optimal growth model ...

title: Creating GAMS model documentations with goxygen
text: Markdown syntax: Since goxygen translates code comments Markdown creating output formats , possible use Markdown syntax goxygen comments. markdown output also stored documentation folder subfolder markdown. Including images: example, 1_equations.gms included image using Markdown syntax. Logo: file model’s main folder named logo.png (image formats) included documentation model logo. References: add literature references documentation please save bibtex file literature.bib main folder model link references using @<id> goxygen comments.<id> stands name corresponding bibtex entry. CITATION.cff: Add meta information model, authors, name model, license etc. adding CITATION.cff file model’s main folder. helps others cite model correctly goxygen includes meta information documentation (e.g. extract model title list model authors file). use different filename CITATION.cff please provide name cff = MYCITATION.cff. Internal links: modular code want link module text use square brackets name module, e.g. \[007_bond\]. case plain code use name gms file want link, e.g. \[equations\]. exception file specified main file model, always referred \[index\].

what: Running goxygen on modularized GAMS code
title: Creating GAMS model documentations with goxygen
text: simple example GAMS model single file plain structure. soon model code get complex helpful structure model modular way, example described Dietrich et al. (2019). modular structure emulates GAMS functions environments programming languages, since GAMS offer feature. separation achieved via structural separation code naming conventions. module comprises code content area can clearly separated content areas topic-wise interacts modules via clearly defined interfaces. modular structure clearly visible code naming convention mentioned folder file structure. Goxygen tailored extract documentation modular structure compile clearly arranged documentation. Goxygen identifies modules interfaces, generates interface plots depict interactions modules, lists inputs outputs modules. module goxygen creates new chapter documentation. demonstrate using simple example model gms package: Now execute goxygen modular GAMS model: Please find goxygen output folder dummymodel/doc.
code: # copy all files and folders containing the modular dummy model file.copy(from = system.file("dummymodel", package = "gms"), to = ".", recursive = TRUE) goxygen::goxygen(path = "dummymodel/", cff = "HOWTOCITE.cff")

title: buildHTML — buildHTML

code: buildHTML(   style = "classic",   folder = "html",   mdfolder = "markdown",   literature = "literature.bib",   citation = "../CITATION.cff",   supplementary = "images",   debug = FALSE,   templatefolder = ".." )

title: buildHTML — buildHTML
text: style visualization style used creation. Currently available styles "classic" "ming" folder location HTML files written mdfolder path markdown folder used source literature path bibliography, available (ignored file exist) citation Citation information citation file format (optional) supplementary vector files /folders required conversion (e.g. images subdirectory figures shown documents) debug logical switches /debug mode return additional status updates keep build files templatefolder Folder goxygen search template files addition pre-installed ones.

title: buildTEX — buildTEX
text: file name tex file written mdfolder path markdown folder used source literature path bibliography, available (ignored file exist) citation Citation information citation file format (optional) supplementary vector files /folders required conversion (e.g. images subdirectory figures shown documents) pdf boolean specifies whether pdf file generated tex style visualization style used Latex/PDF creation. Currently "classic" style available. Ignored outputs Latex/PDF. Can extended additional templates stored templatefolder format <style>.latex. Classic template system.file("templates","classic.latex",package="goxygen") can serve starting point templates. templatefolder Folder goxygen search template files addition pre-installed ones.

title: extractDocumentation — extractDocumentation
text: Extracts doxygen-like GAMS documentation. Entries introduced @type beginning line. case @realization also GAMS code read interpreted, cases specific documentation comment evaluated.

title: extractDocumentation — extractDocumentation
text: path path file(s) evaluated startType set type first line code. can useful extract documentation even documentation type set (e.g reading equations.gms type realization) comment comment chars used documentation comments

title: extractDocumentation — extractDocumentation
text: nested list documentation pieces type name element. element contains two lists `content` containing actual documentation `cfg` containing optional attributes passed type.

title: extractDocumentation — extractDocumentation
text: Jan Philipp Dietrich

title: extractDocumentation — extractDocumentation
flattenPageBlockList — flattenPageBlockList
text: helper processes additional attributes given list code documentation blocks. Code documentation blocks described lists consisting `content` containing documentation `cfg` list containing attributes.

title: flattenPageBlockList — flattenPageBlockList
text: data list documentation pieces type name element

title: flattenPageBlockList — flattenPageBlockList
text: list two element (1) `blocks` containing documentation elements type name element (2) `extraPageBlocks` containing lists blocks put extra pages, sorted page names.

title: flattenPageBlockList — flattenPageBlockList
text: block entry `cgf` attribute `extrapage`, moved separate list `extraPageBlocks` output, need rendered separately later. Regular blocks without `extrapage` attribute moved list `blocks` multiple blocks name merged one block. Cfg attributes `extrapage` currently supported therefore ignored, warning thrown. processing `cfg` attributes, code documentation blocks flattened, .e. list consisting `content` `cfg` entry replaced data `cfg`. helper supports nesting blocks `realizations` code documentation per realization.

title: flattenPageBlockList — flattenPageBlockList
text: Falk Benke

title: goxygen — goxygen
text: Documentation function extracts full model documentation modularized gams model. function extracts comments used documentation, extracts code can extract convert GAMS equations latex code. Output returned Markdown, HTML PDF format.

title: goxygen — goxygen
code: goxygen(   path = ".",   docfolder = "doc",   cache = FALSE,   output = c("html", "tex", "pdf"),   htmlStyle = "ming",   texStyle = "classic",   templatefolder = ".",   cff = "CITATION.cff",   modularCode = is.modularGAMS(),   unitPattern = c("\\(", "\\)"),   includeCore = FALSE,   mainfile = "main.gms",   startType = "equations",   ... )

title: goxygen — goxygen
text: path path model documented docfolder folder documentation written relative model folder cache Boolean allow read data existing cache file output List output written, available "html","pdf" "tex" htmlStyle visualization style used HTML creation. Currently available styles "classic" "ming". Ignored outputs HTML. Can extended additional templates stored templatefolder form <style>.html5 together subfolder supplementary files name style <style> (need provided). preinstalled ming template system.file("templates","ming.css",package="goxygen")  system.file("templates","ming.html5",package="goxygen") can serve starting point templates. texStyle visualization style used Latex/PDF creation. Currently "classic" style available. Ignored outputs Latex/PDF. Can extended additional templates stored templatefolder format <style>.latex. Classic template system.file("templates","classic.latex",package="goxygen") can serve starting point templates. templatefolder Folder goxygen search template files addition pre-installed ones. cff path citation file citation-file-format (ignored existing) modularCode Boolean deciding whether code interpreted modular GAMS code (av) unitPattern pattern usedto identify unit description, default =c("\(","\)") includeCore boolean whether core included , default=FALSE mainfile main file model startType input parameter createListModularCode, default = "equations" ... optional arguments interfaceplot, passed via modules_interfaceplot.

title: goxygen — goxygen
text: Documentation lines code must start *' detected documentation. Identifier beginning block describe kind documentation given. identifiers start @ followed name identifier. Currently, following identifiers available @title Title @authors List authors @description Model description (documentation text interpreted) @equations Equation description (documentation text extracted gams equations  converted latex code) @code Code description (documentation text code extracted) @limitations details limitations implementation @stop everything following ignored next identifier mentioned . Useful  stop section addition can store model logo (100px height, 100px weight) logo.png main folder model used HTML version documentation. want add citations documentation can adding bibtex file name literature.bib main folder model. link references text can use syntax @<id> "<id>" stands identifier given corresponding bibtex entry.

title: goxygen — goxygen
text: Jan Philipp Dietrich

title: goxygen — goxygen
code: # make sure that pandoc is available if (check_pandoc()) {   # run goxygen for dummy model and store documentation as HTML in a temporary directory   docfolder <- paste0(tempdir(), "/doc")   goxygen(system.file("dummymodel", package = "gms"),  docfolder = docfolder, output = "html") } #>  #>  Running codeCheck... #>  Finished data collection...            (time elapsed:  0.009) #>  Naming conventions check done...       (time elapsed:  0.009) #>   Running checkAppearance... #>   Start variable matching...            (time elapsed:  0.001) #>   Finished variable matching...         (time elapsed:  0.001) #>   Start var capitalization check...     (time elapsed:  0.002) #>   Finished var capitalization check...  (time elapsed:  0.003) #>  Investigated variable appearances...   (time elapsed:  0.013) #>  Appearance and usage check done...     (time elapsed:  0.014) #>  Switch Appearance check done...        (time elapsed:  0.015) #>  Interface collection and check done... (time elapsed:  0.015) #>  Input folder check done...             (time elapsed:  0.016) #>  Description check done...              (time elapsed:  0.016) #>  All codeCheck tests passed! #> Warning: The package qgraph is required for creating interface plots! #> Warning: The package qgraph is required for creating interface plots! #> Warning: The package qgraph is required for creating interface plots! #> Warning: Nothing to plot anymore after filters have been applied! #> Start HTML creation... #> ...finished HTML creation!
